key.name: ai-bridge-gnome-launch
key.description: Keybinding to launch two fullscreen terminals on separate monitors with tmux

key.name: fullscreen
key.description: If true, terminals launch in fullscreen. If false, they are maximized.

key.name: terminal
key.description: Terminal emulator to use (must support -s for separate instance and -x for command)

key.name: terminal-1-monitor
key.description: Monitor index for the first terminal window

key.name: terminal-1-cmd
key.default: 'tmux new-session -A -s left \; set-option -t left status-style bg=blue,fg=white \; set-option -t left status-left [left] \; rename-window left'
key.description: Command to run in the first terminal. Default session is named left and uses a blue tmux status bar.

key.name: terminal-2-monitor
key.description: Monitor index for the second terminal window

key.name: terminal-2-cmd
key.default: 'tmux new-session -A -s right \; set-option -t right status-style bg=green,fg=black \; set-option -t right status-left [right] \; rename-window right'
key.description: Command to run in the second terminal. Default session is named right and uses a green tmux status bar.
